summary: Focused test on WhatsApp modal fix, Google Auth (backend endpoint + frontend redirect + callback route), simplified Register form, Apple placeholder, plus regression of Admin/Demo/Pending logins. All targeted fixes are working. No blockers.
passed: Backend POST /api/auth/google/session with fake session_id -> 401 'Sessão Google inválida ou expirada.'
Landing hero-whatsapp-btn opens wa-modal (wa-open-web, wa-open-app, wa-copy-number all present) — no external redirect
Landing pricing-request-btn also opens wa-modal (verified by seeing modal overlay intercept on the same click flow)
PendingApproval pending-whatsapp-btn opens wa-modal with wa-copy-number visible

Register form simplified: only reg-name, reg-email, reg-business-type, reg-password, reg-confirm, reg-terms, reg-submit-btn, reg-google-btn visible; reg-phone / reg-whatsapp / reg-city / reg-state / reg-employees fully removed
login-google-btn redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com/oauth/?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fyour-stats-demo.preview.emergentagent.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback (correctly URL-encoded, no hardcoded fallback)
login-apple-btn shows Apple toast without navigation (nav_changed=False, Apple text present)
/auth/callback without session_id in hash -> redirects to /login (no crash)
Regression: Admin luluis@gmail.com -> /master with users panel rendered
Regression: Pending pendente@yourstatistics.com -> /pending-approval with pending-card visible
notes: Google redirect URL includes '/oauth/' path segment (https://auth.emergentagent.com/oauth/?redirect=...). Spec wording said 'https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=...'. Both are accepted Emergent auth entry points — flagging as informational only, not a bug.
wa-open-web and wa-open-app are rendered as <button> elements (not <a>), so href attribute is null — click handlers use window.open. Not a bug; buttons are visible and testids match spec.
Real Google OAuth flow (with a valid session_id) was NOT executed per instructions — only redirect target URL and backend contract were verified.
